title: Delay full-time operations hire until role scope is cleaner
summary: Chose a narrower interim staffing step instead of a rushed full-time hire.
preferred_option: Delay full-time hire and use a narrower interim step
other_options: Hire now | Keep contractor model unchanged
known_risks: Role ambiguity; onboarding burden; fixed cost growth
actual_outcome: The narrower step reduced chaos and clarified the role.
lesson: Clarify the system before hardening fixed cost.
